/usr/bin/ar qc libvr_base_framework.a CMakeFiles/vr_base_framework.dir/src/core/error_code.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vr_base_framework.dir/src/core/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vr_base_framework.dir/src/core/process_guardian.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vr_base_framework.dir/src/ipc/posix_message_queue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vr_base_framework.dir/src/log/logger.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libvr_base_framework.a
